description: YouTube cached mode — competitor with existing SQLite row returns video_tags and chapter markers

expect.video_tags: non-null array with at least 1 string

prohibit: subscriber counts or view counts in output
any field value not derivable from HTML snapshot

description: YouTube live mode — competitor_url triggers fetch + parse before returning results

expect.video_tags: non-null array if ytInitialPlayerResponse found; null with retrieval_gap if not
expect.retrieval_gaps: empty if video_tags found; non-empty if player response absent

prohibit: invented video tags (any tag not present in actual HTML)
confidence: high when video_tags is null

description: TikTok cached mode — hashtags, sound_name, challenges extracted from SIGI_STATE snapshot

expect.video_tags: null (TikTok does not have YouTube-style hidden tags)

prohibit: sound_is_original invented without SIGI_STATE music.original field
hashtags invented from description text when textExtra is empty

description: Pinterest without Playwright — confidence low, OG tags only, parse_notes explains limitation

expect.hashtags: null or list if found in og:description

prohibit: confidence: high or medium without Playwright
auto_alt_text or saves fields populated from raw HTML (requires Playwright)

description: Unknown platform URL — graceful handling, platform=unknown, no crash
prohibit: exception or error propagated to caller without graceful output
platform guessed as youtube/tiktok/pinterest without URL match

description: Cold start — no SQLite index and cached mode requested — falls back to retrieval_gap record

expect.retrieval_gaps: non-empty — index not found or competitor_id not present
expect.fabrication_flags: empty — null is correct; no invention

prohibit: any non-null video_tags or hashtags when no snapshot exists

description: Stale snapshot — snapshot_age_days > 7 — reports age and recommends refresh without blocking output

expect.confidence: medium or high based on what was in the snapshot

prohibit: blocking output because snapshot is stale — return what we have with a staleness warning
snapshot_age_days reported as 0 or null when snapshot_date is old
